title: Truly Connected
description: Makes a lot of unconnected textures like polished stones and ore blocks connected
body:
# Truly Connected
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fefb3bd353b8caaf111a6ed099941b13517289bf.png)

**_Truly Connected_** is a resource pack that makes a lot of unconnected blocky textures connected so they look more clean and pleasing for the eyes!

Some of the texture changes:

1. All polished and smooth stones
2. Blocks that are made from ores (ex.: Diamond and iron block)
3. Sea Lanters, frog lights, note blocks and a lot more
4. **GLASSES ARE NOT INCLUDED**

### Some changed textures can be found in the gllery
